event.diagnosis: DNS or runtime network resolution failure against CourtListener storage host; not evidence of DOJ blocking.
event.agency_boundary: PACER/court records are judiciary infrastructure, not Department of Justice infrastructure

receiptos_interpretation.reason: One-off access failure has zero bearing on the substantive RP-001 damage claim and does not merit standalone claim indexing.
receiptos_interpretation.audit_value: Prevents narrative drift from failed fetch to unsupported suppression claim while preserving the procedural event.
receiptos_interpretation.promotion_condition: Promote to META-ACCESS-001 only if the access failure becomes a public claim requiring debunking or if repeated failures suggest a coordinated obstruction pattern.

doj_blocking_inference.confidence: High that this observed fetch failure was not DOJ blocking
doj_blocking_inference.best_explanation: CourtListener/local DNS or network access issue, not DOJ suppression
